verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The joy of the Lord is my power. The joy of the Lord is my power. The joy of the Lord is my power. The joy of the Lord is my power.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is living water and I do not thirst anymores. There is living water and I do not thirst anymores. There is living water and I do not thirst anymores. The joy of the Lord is my power.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I became his child and I love him. I became his child and I love him. I became his child and I love him. The joy of the Lord is my power.
